versionId.description: Unique identifier of the file's current version.

folder.description: Hypermedia link of the folder to which the file belongs.

matter.description: Hypermedia link of the matter to which the file belongs.

name.description: Name of the file, excluding file extension.

ownerId.description: Unique identifier of the user who created/uploaded this file.

to.description: The 'To' or recipients' email address (only applicable for email files).

from.description: The 'From' or sender's email address (only applicable for email files).

dateCreated.description: The original datetime that the file was created.

dateModified.description: The datetime that the file was last modified.

downloadInfo.description: Hypermedia link to the download details of the file.

additionalData.description: Collection of file meta data as KeyValuePair(string, object).

isFavorite.description: Flag indicating whether this file is a favorite

isUploaded.description: Flag indicating whether the file contents are uploaded to the server.

isCancelled.description: Flag indicating whether the file upload has been cancelled.

isDuplicate.description: Flag indicating whether the file data is duplicated. Applies to emails only for now.

isDeleted.description: Flag indicating whether the file has been deleted.
